warnings.label: Only partial results were found with given criteria, some suppliers are missing

fare.label: Elige
fare.conditions:
Sales conditions: Connection time should be 60 minutes (Change of train is made in same station) to 90 minutes (Change of train is made between two stations of the same city).

Refunds: If ticket not used, 70% refundable before train departure. Thereafter, no refund allowed.

Exchanges: If ticket not used, fully exchangeable once before train departure. Thereafter, no exchange allowed. Passenger must pay the difference in price for next available fare in same or higher class of service. Furthermore if the changed ticket is cheaper, 15% will be discounted from the price difference.

fare.label: Promo
fare.conditions:
Sales conditions: Connection time should be 60 minutes (Change of train is made in same station) to 90 minutes (Change of train is made between two stations of the same city).

Non-refundable, non-exchangeable

fare.label: Premium
fare.conditions:
Sales conditions: Connection time should be 60 minutes (Change of train is made in same station) to 90 minutes (Change of train is made between two stations of the same city).

Refunds: If ticket not used, fully refundable until 7 days before departure, then 95% refundable before train departure. Thereafter, no refund allowed. No refund possible once exchanged.

Exchanges: If ticket not used, exchangeable before train departure. Thereafter, no exchange allowed. Unlimited exchanges allowed. Passenger must pay the difference in price for next available fare in same or higher class of service. Furthermore if the changed ticket is cheaper, 15% will be discounted from the price difference.

fare.conditions:

fare.conditions:
Sales conditions: Connection time should be 60 minutes (Change of train is made in same station) to 90 minutes (Change of train is made between two stations of the same city).

Refunds: If ticket not used, 70% refundable before train departure. Thereafter, no refund allowed.

Exchanges: If ticket not used, fully exchangeable once before train departure. Thereafter, no exchange allowed. fare.label: Infinita + Large suitcase
fare.conditions:
- 1 handbag, 1 cabin luggage and 1 large luggage only

Refunds: Before 7 days: 85%. After: 75%

Exchanges: Changes of time in same travel day: included. Changes of date: pay the difference in fare. Name change: 20€
In case where it is detailed "Payment of the fare difference 24 hours in advance": the fare difference must be paid no later than 24 hours before the departure of the train.
Changes allowed up to 30 minutes before boarding
Changes for missed train in the limit of 2 hours: 30€ 

Exchange not possible through our system.

fare.label: Infinita Bistró
fare.conditions:
-1 handbag, 1 cabin luggage and 1 large luggage only. Including pet of maximum 10 kilos in a carriage (60x35x35 cm)

Refunds: Before 7 days: 95% After: 90%. Less than 24h before train departure time a fee of 30% will be applied.

Exchanges: Changes of time in same travel day: included. Changes of date: pay the difference in fare. Name change: included.
In case where it is detailed "Payment of the fare difference 24 hours in advance": the fare difference must be paid no later than 24 hours before the departure of the train.
Changes allowed up to 30 minutes before boarding
Changes for missed train in the limit of 2 hours: 10€

Exchange not possible through our system.

fare.label: Inicial
fare.conditions:
- 1 handbag and 1 cabin luggage only

Non refundable

Exchanges: Changes of time in same travel day: pay the difference in fare. Changes of date: 10 € extra + pay the difference in fare. Name change: 40€
In case where it is detailed "Payment of the fare difference 24 hours in advance": the fare difference must be paid no later than 24 hours before the departure of the train.
Changes allowed up to 30 minutes before boarding
Changes for missed train: not included

Exchange not possible through our system.
